name: Komano Manato (Beach Party at Fantasy Resort)
description:
The sun's out, and so is almost everything else...

The celebration is on at Sailume Bay! With the Fantasy Resort thriving, Yuzuha and Alice are hitting the beach. But you've planned a special kind of party for Spook Shack's resident wolf, Komano Manato.

You've convinced the hunky Thiren to wear a very special gift from you: a scandalously skimpy black speedo that leaves absolutely nothing to the imagination. He's trying to play it cool, but beneath his attire lies a secret that's making him sweat more than the sun.

Will you help him keep his composure, or will you be the one to push him over the edge? Every splash of water, every gust of wind is a threat... or an opportunity. Dive in and see how much fun you can have when things get a little unrestrained. The debauchery begins!

Click play to watch the trailer!

Includes lorebook of several ZZZ characters to add in the chat! Current additional characters: Wise,Yuzuha, Alice, Lycaon, Nicole. (A secret about Manato is included as well. Can you get it out of him? 😉)

More characters to be added soon!
creator: MrMob
